description: English-only discover_tools seed for active protocol retrieval. The first 100 blind prompts simulate an agent/user that does not know protocol names. The next 100 protocol-aware prompts mention a platform/protocol name but not internal tool IDs or function names. Expected IDs must be exact active tool IDs or valid active prefixes; expectedCoverageGroups measure multi-step coverage.
